code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut done = false
  while i < n
    if not done
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      else
        if has
          let next_sum = total + cur
          if next_sum > 100
            done = true
          else
            total = next_sum
          end
          cur = 0
          has = false
        end
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has and not done
    let next_sum = total + cur
    if next_sum <= 100
      total = next_sum
    end
  end
  print("total=#{total}")
end
